author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو جعفر محمد بن جرير الطبري
author_identification.scholarly_standing: One of the most prominent and influential scholars of Islam, renowned for his comprehensive works in tafsir, history, and fiqh.
author_identification.methodological_stance: Known for his meticulous approach to tafsir, combining narrative (riwaya) and analytical (diraya) methods, and for his independence in legal reasoning.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A foundational work in tafsir, widely regarded as one of the most comprehensive and authoritative commentaries on the Quran.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Considered a cornerstone of Islamic scholarship, influencing generations of scholars and serving as a primary reference in tafsir studies.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Abdullah bin Abdul Mohsin al-Turki is a respected scholar and editor known for his rigorous and meticulous approach to tahqiq.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition is based on multiple manuscripts and includes extensive annotations, variant readings, and a critical apparatus.
